urdummlu_1shot.doc_to_text:
def doc_to_text(doc):
    options = doc["options"]
    return (
        f"Subject: {doc['domain']} – {doc['subdomain']} | Level: {doc['level']}\n\n"
        f"Question: {doc['question']}\n\n"
        f"A) {options['A']}\n"
        f"B) {options['B']}\n"
        f"C) {options['C']}\n"
        f"D) {options['D']}\n\n"
        "Answer key:"
    )
urdummlu_1shot.doc_to_target:
def doc_to_target(doc):
    key = doc["correct_key"]
    answer_text = doc["options"][key]
    return f"{key}\nAnswer text: {answer_text}"
urdummlu_1shot.description:
You are an expert multiple-choice question answering assistant.
Read the question carefully and select the single best answer.

Respond in EXACTLY this two-line format, with no extra text:

Answer key: <one of A, B, C, D>
Answer text: <verbatim text of the chosen option, copied character-for-character>

Do not add explanations, preambles, markdown, or punctuation
outside of the format. The Answer text must match the option text
exactly so the response can be parsed programmatically.
